info.description:
Backend Go + Gin untuk aplikasi video conference berbasis LiveKit.
Auth pakai dua jenis JWT: app JWT (untuk endpoint backend ini) dan LiveKit JWT (untuk connect ke LiveKit server, di-issue oleh /api/token).
info.title: Videoconf Backend API

post.description: Login pakai email + password. Sukses dapet app JWT yang valid 24 jam. Rate-limited (5 req burst per IP).
Bikin user baru. Email harus unik, password min 8 char, di-hash pakai bcrypt. Sukses langsung dapet app JWT (gak perlu login lagi). Rate-limited (5 req burst per IP).

Owner only (cek via room.owner_id). Backend call Egress stop, update status ke "ending". Status jadi "complete" pas file selesai upload (sekarang manual update — webhook auto-update bisa di-add nanti).
User yang login otomatis jadi owner. Slug optional — kalau kosong, di-generate random shortuuid.

400.description: name kosong atau slug pattern invalid

get.description: Return semua room dimana current user adalah owner, urut paling baru duluan.
Detail satu room. Kalau private, cuma owner yang bisa lihat. idOrSlug bisa numeric room id atau slug string.

delete.description: Owner only. Cascading delete: messages dan recordings ikut kehapus (FK ON DELETE CASCADE).

post.description: Owner only. Locked = /api/token reject non-owner. Tidak ngusir participant yang udah connect — kombinasi dengan kick untuk evict semua.

get.description: Return message DESC by id (paling baru duluan). Pagination cursor-based via `before` (pakai id paling tua dari page sebelumnya).

parameters.description: kalau diisi, return message dengan id < before
parameters.name: before

post.description: Persist chat message ke DB. Akses control: owner private OK, anyone untuk public. Real-time delivery di-handle frontend via LiveKit data channel terpisah.

get.description: Owner only. Live state dari LiveKit RoomService — bukan dari DB. Identity tiap participant = app user.id (string).

delete.description: Owner only. Forced disconnect via LiveKit. Participant bisa rejoin kalau room masih unlocked — kombinasi lock+kick untuk benar-benar exclude.

post.description: Owner only. Backend list track participant, filter by source, terus call LiveKit MutePublishedTrack per track yang match. Source kosong = semua track.

get.description: Owner only. Urut paling baru duluan (DESC by started_at).

post.description: Owner only. Pakai LiveKit Egress room composite (grid layout) → MP4 → upload ke MinIO bucket "recordings". Egress butuh participant aktif — kalau room kosong return 502.
Owner only. Restore akses non-owner ke /api/token (kalau room public).

Generate JWT untuk frontend connect ke LiveKit server. Cek dulu user authorized buat room (owner kalau private, anyone kalau public, harus unlocked atau owner). Identity di LiveKit = user.id, name = display_name. Token valid 6 jam.

403.description: private dan bukan owner, atau locked dan bukan owner

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" lalu spasi, lalu app JWT yang didapat dari /auth/login atau /auth/register.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
